reviews.review_msg: Professor Saria is an *incredible* prof. 10/10 would (and will) take one of their classes again, and am waiting for one to become available. Make sure to do the readings and participate in class, and you will do well. They clearly care about their students, and it definitely makes a difference in your learning when you engage with their lectures.

Lectures are information heavy but it's really good things to learn especially about South Asian cultures. They don't use slides, but they do write on the board (but I found difficulty in staying focused). They're super chill with the attendence, you can literally just write your name and leave and that's okay.
Course load and their marking style are very straightforward; No-BS marker. Weekly reading summaries + midterm + final

Dr. Saria is the best prof I've ever had! I've taken all of their classes and enjoyed their immense wisdom and wit. You might think Dr. Saria is "harsh", but they're actually just keeping it real and giving you the feedback you need to be better, dont waste the opportunity to learn from them.
